name: Chicken Broccoli Orientale
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet or wok over medium-high heat, add hot oil.
2. Stir-fry half the chicken until browned, stirring occasionally. Remove and set aside.
3. Repeat with the remaining chicken.
4. In the same skillet, stir-fry onion and green pepper until tender-crisp, stirring occasionally.
5. Reduce heat to low.
6. Stir in the reserved chicken, broccoli soup, water, and soy sauce.
7. Heat through, stirring occasionally.
8. Meanwhile, cook noodles according to package directions.
9. Add seasoning packets; drain off most of the liquid.
10. Spoon the chicken mixture over the noodles.
11. Serve with additional soy if desired.
